full_text:
Lu Xun (Boyan) 陸遜 (伯言)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Xun (陸遜), styledBoyan (伯言), was born in Wu County, Wu Commandery (Presently Su Zhou in Jiang Su Province). Famous and brilliant Wu commander that defeated Liu Bei at Yiling. Lu Xun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Xun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
